title: Union High vs Nico Malan High School
description: CRICKET NEWS AND VIDEO - Union High School...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRICKET NEWS AND VIDEO - Union High School and Nico Malan van Humansdorp are taking on one another during the 17th annual Senior Cricket Festival.","html":"CRICKET NEWS AND VIDEO - Union High School and Nico Malan van Humansdorp are taking on one another during the 17th annual Senior Cricket Festival."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This festival started on Thursday and will end today with T20 games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union High still needs to bat.","html":"Union High still needs to bat."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"VIDEO - 17th annual Senior Cricket Festival (Video: Sonia Wahl)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
